name: Jasper Mining Corporation
summary: Jasper Mining Corporation engages in the exploration and development of base and precious metals in British Columbia, Canada. It explores for lead, zinc, silver, gold, copper, molybdenum, and tungsten properties. The company holds interests in Isintok, which consists of 3,007 hectares located in Okanagan valley; Vowell Creek that comprises of 12,750.20 hectares in south of Golden, British Colombia; and McFarlane, which consists of 3,058 hectares located in Kootney Lake, British Colombia. Jasper Mining Corporation was incorporated in 1994 and is based in Calgary, Canada.
